full_text:
Liu Du 劉度
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Liu Du (劉度). Governed Lingling. He surrendered to Liu Bei. Liu Du was affiliated with Liu Biao and the Shu Kingdom.
